description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a hip roof and a detached garage, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped yard. The front facade features a covered porch with columns, a central entry door, and symmetrical window placement. The side and rear yards include a paved patio area, outdoor seating, and a small pool or hot tub. The house is adorned with climbing greenery and shrubs, and the windows are rectangular with dark trim. The garage is attached via a short breezeway and has a single large door. The property is well-maintained, with a mix of grass, paved walkways, and decorative plants.
description: A two-story brick house with a hip roof, attached garage, covered porch, and landscaped yard featuring a patio and small pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, attached garage to the left, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, climbing greenery, and a clear view of the boundary wall and side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor seating, small pool, and the back of the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, paved driveway, and additional landscaping along the side and rear.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, and a single front door flanked by windows.
